title: Triaristella tenuissima
taxonomy: Triaristella tenuissima is classified within the family Polyciridae. This family is part of the phylum Annelida and the class Polychaeta, which includes segmented worms. Polychaeta is further divided into several orders, with Triaristella tenuissima being a part of the order Terebellida. The classification of Triaristella tenuissima reflects its unique characteristics and its relationship to other polychaete worms. Understanding the classification of Triaristella tenuissima helps scientists to better comprehend its evolutionary history and its place in the natural world.
